content.en:
"Forget it, my current cultivation is only a high-level realm god, and my strength is not too powerful, even if I really enter the Death Void, I may not have any gains. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Of course, if there was a way to enter the Death Void, he would definitely do so.

But judging from the current situation, if you don't become a supreme force, it is almost difficult to get a way to enter the Death Void from other supreme forces~.

As for wanting to forcibly tear through the barriers of the Eternal Realm and the Realm of the Divine Realm and enter the Void of Death, it is almost impossible to do.

If you can do this, you can go to any of the Boundary Rifts-Realm.

The strength required for this is not something that ordinary peak realm gods can do, Ye Tian can't do it anyway.

The Eternal Realm, the Realm God Realm, the Demon Seed Abyss, and the Boundary Crack Realm, these realms are equivalent to the inside of the box, and the Death Void is equivalent to the outside of the box, and the walls of this box are too tough.

Ye Tian also tried, but he couldn't even shake it.

Only by finding the opening of the box can you easily jump out of the box and enter the Void of Death.

Therefore, Ye Tian still can't enter the Death Void at the moment, so he doesn't want to do this.

......

In the following years, Ye Tian practiced hard while studying the extradimensional technique.

Just two extra-dimensional techniques are still not enough, if more extra-dimensional techniques are studied, his strength can continue to improve a bit.

And just like that, the long years passed.

These days, there are more and more middle-level realm gods of the human race, and there are more and more middle-level peak realm gods, but it is difficult for high-level realm gods to continue to give birth to one.

After all, the birth of any high-level realm god is not easy, if it is not for Ye Tian's help, it will be extremely difficult for those mid-level peak realm gods to impact the cultivation of high-level realm gods, and if they fail once, it will be difficult to continue to impact for a long time.

The human race is now the foundation and the cultivation time is too short, and it is difficult to catch up with the foundation of those top forces for a while.

After all, those top forces have existed for countless years, and they are all unimaginable long years of cultivation and accumulation of the human race, where can they be surpassed at once!

Before you know it, the billion-billion-time solstice era has passed.

After such a long period of development, the Endless Seam Realm has also provided a lot of resources for the human race and cultivated a large number of realm gods.

Moreover, several mid-level peak realm gods are about to approach the limit of the mid-level peak realm gods, and it is estimated that there will be about a billion years to reach the Dao era, and there is hope to impact the high-level realm gods, but their success rate is not high, at most there is a 10% chance that they will reach the sky.

Therefore, there is a high probability that no one will be able to break through to the high-level realm of divine cultivation.

As for Ye Tian, after such a long period of research, he finally studied an extradimensional technique again.

"Extradimensional Realm Wood Escape"

This extra-dimensional technique is based on the wood fragments of the Kun Realm, and manipulates the power of the extra-dimensional to form a cyan light, and its speed is extremely fast.

Ye Tian had tested the speed of this Escape Light, which was several times faster than in the past.

The point is that in some places that can limit his previous speed, there is no way to restrict the Outer Dimensional Realm Mu Escape, and he can even easily escape from the Eternal Realm to the Realm God Realm, silently, and the Realm Court Headquarters cannot detect his fluctuations.

I have to say that such a retreat extradimensional technique is indeed terrifying, and its assistance to combat effectiveness is incomparably strong.

After creating the Transcendent Realm Mu Dunguang, Ye Tian's strength had skyrocketed.

The only pity is that materials like the Demon Immortal Xuansha are not very helpful to him, he has refined a billion Dao Era years, and the Eternal Dao Seed has not improved much.

Perhaps for other high-level peak realm gods, the Demon Nether Xuansha has some use, but it is not of much use to him.

In terms of whether he is strong or not, his Eternal Dao Seed is much stronger than those Eternal Dao Seeds of those high-level peak realm gods, but it is only a little worse in quality.

Therefore, the resources he needed could almost match the peak realm gods.

Demon Xuansha, it's still a little worse.

Direct refining is not possible, but indirect refining may be useful.

The so-called indirect refining is to create a super-dimensional secret technique to refine various resources, and refine various resources beyond the limit, so that you can refine the eternal Dao seed faster.

Such a super-dimensional secret technique is not necessarily complicated, and he still has the hope of creating it.

Thereupon. []

In the following days, Ye Tian often used the copy body to study such a super-dimensional secret technique, and the copy body was seriously damaged many times.

However, he didn't care about the loss of replicating the body, and studied it again and again.

Gradually, hundreds of millions of solstice years passed.

Finally this day.

Ye Tian had already researched a superdimensional secret technique, which could use superdimensional power to assist in refining various resources faster.

For example, the resource of Demon Styx Xuansha was already of little help to him before, and the refining effect was too poor.

But now, with the help of this super dimensional secret technique, the improvement effect has directly skyrocketed tenfold.

It seems that it has only risen tenfold, but it was easy to fall into a bottleneck in the past, but now it will not fall into a bottleneck, so the effect is far more than ten times.

What's more, after casting this super dimensional secret technique, the speed of absorbing refining resources is also much faster!

In short, after he performed this super dimensional secret technique, the effect of the Eternal Dao Seed refining was too good, and it grew at a speed that was visible to the naked eye.

"This super dimensional secret technique has to be named, so it's called the super dimensional source swallowing technique!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

With this Extra-dimensional Source Swallowing Technique, Ye Tian's cultivation speed was much faster.

It's a pity that his wives and children can't use this super dimensional secret technique, after all, they don't fuse the Kun Realm wood fragments, and they can't control the super dimensional power.

Ye Tian didn't plan to let his wife and children fuse the extradimensional things now, after all, the fate of the failure of the fusion, he still remembered, and even if the fusion was successful, if he couldn't completely control the superdimensional power, in the future, the eternal Dao species and the physical body would be affected by the superdimensional power, and they would gradually assimilate.

In this way, the future will be certain death.

Therefore, until he finds a solution to this problem, he will not let his relatives be involved in the study and fusion of extradimensional powers.

"With the Transcendent Dimensional Source Swallowing Technique, it won't take me too long to reach the high-level peak realm god cultivation in the future, once the cultivation reaches this level, the combat power is definitely comparable to the peak realm god who has condensed the twelfth eternal realm spirit. "

Ye Tian was full of confidence and said for a long time.
